reapack.name: Swap-ItemsPositionsOnSameTracks.lua
reapack.desc: Swap the position of 2 selected items

reapack.name: TimeShift.lua
reapack.desc: Inspired by Edit/Shift in Pro Tools, with more features

reapack.name: CreateTracksFrom-Text
reapack.author: Mariow
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by GitHub Copilot. Create tracks in REAPER with names, parent/child relationships, spacers, and colors.

reapack.name: Interactive-TC-Display
reapack.author: Mariow
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by GitHub Copilot. Interactive display of TimeCode, items, and status for REAPER.

reapack.name: Swap-ItemsPositionsOnSameTracks
reapack.author: Mariow
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by GitHub Copilot. Swap the positions of two items.

reapack.name: TimeShift
reapack.author: Mariow
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by GitHub Copilot. Precise shifting of items, time selection, and cursor position.

reapack.name: View-Item-Metadatas
reapack.author: Mariow
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by GitHub Copilot. View item's metadata.
